meta.title: DLS 6x6 Higher Lenses — Five-Layer Ontology and Cross-Lens Calculus
meta.description: The 6x6 DLS framework is a preserved 4D kernel seated into a six-sector shell, rendered through admissible mirror-board charts, read through four constitutive lenses, and advanced by a Q/O torsion law with 6-sector and 12-beat closure.
meta.key_insight: The 6 selects; the 4 computes. Two intertwined exponentials: a 4-based computational body and a 6-based selector-shell carrier.

layers.description: The 4x4 lawful seed. The 6-system does not replace it; it chooses which lawful 4-projection is active.
Six coherent shell sectors: three phase currents crossed with a mirror bit
Visible 6x6 board: a reversal-skeleton realization of the shell, not the shell itself
Square/Flower/Cloud/Fractal are constitutive projections of one object; a mature object exists only when all four agree without contradiction
The 6x6 state must collapse to a seed and re-expand without identity drift. Framework incomplete until Fractal can store generator, witness, and replay law for the same state.

carrier_state_6d.separation_principle: Stops mixing up board state, lens state, shell state, and payload state

board_operators.description: Admissible mirror-board layer with anti-block flips and transpose duality

operators.description: Pure phase advance through Sa -> Su -> Me -> Sa

operators.formula: H = O . Q, so H(pi, chi) = (pi + 1 mod 3, -chi)
operators.description: Local torsion hinge giving exact six-step shell torsion cycle
operators.cycle: Sa+ -> Su- -> Me+ -> Sa- -> Su+ -> Me- -> Sa+

shell_operators.closure_note: 6 shell torsion steps = 12 fundamental beats. Shell closes in 6 sector-steps, but lived Flower body closes over 12 beat-events.

flower_carrier_law.formula: m_3(i, b, o) = (i + 1 mod 3, b + 2 mod 4, -o)
flower_carrier_law.description: Local 6D anti-spin carrier: 3 petals + 4 beats + sign flip

cross_lens_calculus.description: The principal 6D loop through all four constitutive renderers

bridges.meaning: Read committed board as current/beat/torsion state
bridges.interpretation: Square tells you what is committed; Flower tells you how that commitment is being lived

bridges.meaning: Pass from lived current state to lawful admissibility bundle
bridges.interpretation: Cloud is structured bundle over sector, chart, and embedded payload possibilities

bridges.formula: sigma_6 if support collapses coherently, else R(mu) residual packet
bridges.interpretation: Cloud is not always point-like; sometimes output is a residual, not a fake exact seed

cross_lens_calculus.deepest_law: Cloud -> Square is generally a refinement operator, not a point-function

higher_lift_law.formula: D_{6,n} = [4]^n semi F_6^n, F_6 = Pi_3 x Z_2

structural_examples.meaning: Four-axis shell atlas over canonical 4 kernel coordinates

higher_lift_law.principle: Two intertwined exponentials: a 4-based computational body and a 6-based selector-shell carrier

chart_atlas_24.factorization: A_24^chart ~ Z_2^Tau x Z_2^T x Z_6^H (chart rectangle x shell torsion cycle)
chart_atlas_24.slot_object: Xi_{X,s} = (X; epsilon_X, t_X, P_X; pi_s, chi_s; S_s; Sigma_s)
chart_atlas_24.chart_rectangle: For fixed shell s: A_s <-Tau-> B_s, A_s <-T-> D_s, etc.
chart_atlas_24.shell_cycle_per_chart: For fixed X: X_Sa+ -> X_Su- -> X_Me+ -> X_Sa- -> X_Su+ -> X_Me- -> X_Sa+

cockpit_96.description: Real execution surface separating chart state, lens state, shell state, and payload state

sigma15_to_sigma60.description: Lens escalation from 15 observation modes to 60 complete perspectives
sigma15_to_sigma60.sigma_15: 15 nonempty subsets of {Square, Flower, Cloud, Fractal}
sigma15_to_sigma60.sigma_60: 15 x 4 = 60 complete perspectives (each mode x each primary lens)
sigma15_to_sigma60.principle: Every observation mode can be read through each of the four primary lenses

8d_bridge_body.description: 8D pentadic bridge body: 5 controlled 6D weave bodies
8d_bridge_body.structural_state: Omega_8 = (w, p, b, o; g, lambda, phi, alpha)

components.p: Which of 3 embedded 4D diagonal cockpits (Su, Me, Sa)

crossing_laws.inner_6d: m_3(p,b,o) = (p+1 mod 3, b+2 mod 4, -o) with K_3 = Z_12
crossing_laws.outer_8d: m_5(w,b,o) = (w+1 mod 5, b+2 mod 4, -o) with K_5 = Z_20
crossing_laws.diagonal_shuttle: Delta_15 = m_5 . m_3: advances diagonally through 15-cockpit lattice preserving beat/parity

8d_bridge_body.lookup_string: W_w : P_p : B_b : O_o : M<g, lambda, phi, alpha>
